Ghulam Abbas Kuber AAG with Hissam Memon Executive Engineer West Division Khairpur and Riaz Hussain Solangi Assistant Executive Engineer Paryloi Sub Division و4+ +44+++++44رل14 It is stated by the Counsel that petitioner is not being provided water to his lands as per share Para-wise comments have been filed by Respondents No 4 & 5 along with certain documents, which ٥٢٤ taken record In their comments have stated that petitioner is irrigating his whole land and in fact is getting water more than due share They have also submitted the relevant record supporting their statements In such circumstances ٨٥ case f٥٢ indulgence is made out Accordingly this petition is dismissed with pending applicationts) If any along list they along
